B1-MAIN-0026.meaning_en: to copy; to copy from someone

B1-MAIN-0286.meaning_en: to be located; to find oneself; to consider

B1-MAIN-0343.meaning_en: to tell or let someone know

B1-MAIN-0643.meaning_en: to hire; to set or adjust; to discontinue

B1-MAIN-1070.meaning_en: to grab or reach; to help oneself

examples.Was für einen Saft möchten Sie? – Ganz e: What kind of juice would you like? – It doesn't matter, any kind.

B1-MAIN-1542.meaning_en: go!; going on; loose or off-

examples.Gibt es ein Problem? Was ist denn los?: Is there a problem? What's going on?

examples.Meine Tochter hat gerade die Matura gema: My daughter has just completed her school-leaving examination.

I'd like a box of matches.

B1-MAIN-2930.meaning_en: to close or shut; to approach

examples.Ich kriege jetzt doch eine Woche Urlaub,: I am getting a week's holiday after all—specifically next month.

B1-WG-0059.meaning_en: to do casual work; to have a temporary job
